name: beach-context
description: Context, skills, issue workflows, and bundled references for BEACH simulation users and maintainers.

interface.shortDescription: Simulator-specific context for BEACH configs, runs, outputs, and learning.
interface.longDescription: Multilingual skills, bundled references, and workflows for reviewing BEACH configs, diagnosing failed runs, designing cases, analyzing outputs, learning simulator concepts, preparing user issues, and summarizing numerical methods.
